en.name: N4ML
en.tagline: A person who weaves stories into sound.
en.education:
Seoul Institute of the Arts
Electronic Music

Sejong Arts High School
Composition
en.creditsText:
# Career (English)

| 2026

* arune 1st Original <Love Novel> — Executive Producer, Composer, Arranger, Bass
* Soonimoon Special Stage <BIGBANG - BLUE> — Arranger

| 2025

* TOVE <Daisy in Eternity (Fairy Tale Ver.)> — Arranger, Strings, Piano, MIDI Programming
* V-llage Kurogami Sasha 1st Single <Fallen Leaves> — Executive Producer, Composer, Arranger
* Haebin (gugudan) <Cleaning My Heart> — Arranger, Piano
* Soonimoon Special Stage <FIFTY FIFTY - Gravity> — Arranger
* TV Anime <Gangchi Island> Opening Theme — Arranger, Vocal Tuning
* Haebom 3rd Single <Love Dopamine> — Composer, Arranger, Vocal Director, Vocal Editor
* DOLONGCHA 1st Single <The Run Catch> — Co-Composer, Co-Arranger, Vocal Coach, Vocal Editor
* Official 1st Anniversary OST Album for Zenless Zone Zero <Drawing Summer> — Producer, Composer, Arranger
* OSDS (Osondoson) 1st Single <Bluetooth> — Track Maker, Composer, Arranger
* Mainichi Matsuri 3rd Single <New Year's Resolution> — Executive Producer, Composer, Arranger, Lyricist, Recording Engineer
* V-llage Floweress Loe 1st Single <Floris Waltz> — Executive Producer, Composer, Arranger
* Dear my heroes 1st Album <Early Spring> — Arranger
* V-LUP Veldir 1st Single <Pompous> — Producer, Composer, Arranger, Vocal Editor

| 2024

* RoA <WRAP UP> — Composer, Arranger
* GXG Game Music Competition <Run into Galaxy> Gold Prize — Composer, Arranger, Executive Producer
* V-llage 1st Album <SilverLine> — Album Planning, Investment, Executive Producer, Composer, Arranger, Lyricist
* V-llage Visual Novel <Welcome to V-llage!> Theme Song <My Village> — Composer, Arranger
* V-llage Tigris Kanin 1st Single <Kanism☆Holic> — Composer, Arranger
* Mafia Dongsan Crew Performance <Backstage> — Composer, Arranger, Executive Producer
* Soraniwa Project <Watercolour> — Composer, Arranger

| 2023

* POCOTONE × Sixtar Gate: STARTRAIL POCOTONE Pack — Project Manager
* Sixtar Gate: STARTRAIL - POCOTONE Pack <Flower Garden> — Chord Composer, Piano
* Sixtar Gate: STARTRAIL - POCOTONE Pack <Cosmic Telepathy> — Composer, Arranger
* Honkai: Star Rail <STAR to STAR / Multiverse Moment> Contest — Excellence Award & Popularity Award / Composer, Arranger, Executive Producer
* Monthly POCOTONE <TO YOU> — Arranger
* Project Connect SEASON 1 <Side Road (ED)> — Composer, Arranger

| 2022

* POCOTONE <With Me> — Executive Producer, Track Maker, Vocal Editor, Vocal Tuning
* Project Connect SEASON 1 — Executive Producer, Project Contributor
* Project Connect SEASON 1 <CONNECT, to World!>, <Between the Stars>, <Party Night>, <Clear FANFARE!>, etc. — Composer, Arranger, Producer
* EPIC7 <Always With You> — Composer, Arranger, Producer
* Last Origin Miss Orca <New Page>, <My Master Overdose>, <Polaris> — Composer, Arranger
* Last Origin Miss Orca <A Story I Want to Tell> — Producer
* Last Origin Café Amor × Horizon <Gray Clouds>, <GO UP!>, <Welcome to Last Paradise!> — Composer, Arranger
* Last Origin Café Amor × Horizon <Love Is Like Parfait> — Arranger
* V-LUP <MyWaY!!!> — Producer
* V-LUP <Paradise> — Composer, Arranger
* V-LUP Lee Juin <Shining Day!> — Track Maker, Composer, Arranger
* Tayo the Little Bus <Heavy Equipment Race> — Arranger

| 2021

* Webtoon <My Neighbor's Younger Brother Is an Elementary School Student, but He's Too Good!> Ending Theme <Destiny> — Track Maker, Arranger
* Game <Fantasy Town> Advertisement Music — Composer, Arranger
* Game <Last Origin> <FLIGHT AGAIN> — Composer, Arranger
* Bed Taker <Night Sky> — Composer, Arranger, Lyricist
* Seoul Institute of the Arts Promotional Film <WE ARE SIA!> — Composer, Arranger, Vocal Tuning
* Pororo <Pororo and Petty's Colorful Ball Game>, <Tell Me Honestly> — Arranger
* HUBOG Cover <Remember> — Arranger

| 2020

* Atofriends <New Year's Wish Dance>, <2020 Christmas> — Arranger
* 2020 AINSE Creative Music Festival <Welly Goes to School>, <Good Comments, My Face>, <A Warm Internet World> — Arranger
* KEBIKIDS <Dinosaur Extinction Song> — Arranger
* HUBOG Cover <Tenbyou no Uta>, <Merry Go Round (Solo Ver.)> — Arranger

| 2019

* HUBOG Cover <Eine Kleine> — Arranger
* Original Work <Sailing StarS!> — Producer
* Original Work <Growing!> — Producer

| 2018

* Sejong Arts High School School Anthem — Executive Producer, Composer, Arranger, Lyricist
* Original Work <TOMORROW!> — Producer
* Original Work <Sketchbook> — Producer

news.title: TALETONE, 첫 이야기를 시작합니다
news.body:
드디어 TALETONE이 첫걸음을 시작했습니다.

오래전부터 머릿속에만 있던 이야기와 음악, 그리고 우리가 만들고 싶은 세계를 하나의 이름 아래에 모으기까지 생각보다 많은 시간이 걸렸습니다.
그 과정이 쉽지만은 않았지만, 함께 고민하고 움직여준 사람들 덕분에 이렇게 시작을 알릴 수 있게 되었습니다.

TALETONE은 단순히 음악을 만드는 곳이 아니라,
이야기가 소리가 되고, 소리가 다시 누군가의 세계로 닿을 수 있도록 만들어가는 팀이 되고자 합니다.

함께해준 멤버들, 작업에 힘을 보태준 분들, 그리고 늘 응원해주시는 모든 분들께 진심으로 감사드립니다.
아직은 작은 출발이지만, 앞으로 더 좋은 음악과 이야기로 차근차근 보여드리겠습니다.

앞으로의 TALETONE도 잘 부탁드립니다.

이야기는 고유한 빛깔을 품고,
그 빛깔은 음악으로 피어난다.
TALETONE MUSIC

en.title: TALETONE Begins Its First Story
en.summary: At last, TALETONE has taken its first step.
en.body:
At last, TALETONE has taken its first step.

It took longer than we ever imagined to gather the stories, the music, and the world we had dreamed of into a single name. It wasn't always an easy journey, but thanks to everyone who believed in us and walked alongside us, we're finally able to share this beginning.

TALETONE is more than a place where music is made.
We hope to become a team where stories become sound, and that sound finds its way into someone's world.

To our members, everyone who lent their hands to this journey, and everyone who has continued to support us—thank you from the bottom of our hearts.

This may be a small beginning, but we'll continue writing new stories through music, one page at a time.

Thank you for being part of TALETONE's story.

A tale becomes a tone.
A tone becomes music.

TALETONE MUSIC

jp.title: TALETONE、最初の物語を始めます。
jp.summary: ついに、TALETONEが最初の一歩を踏み出しました。
jp.body:
ついに、TALETONEが最初の一歩を踏み出しました。

長いあいだ胸の中で温めてきた物語と音楽、そして私たちが描きたかった世界を、一つの名前のもとに形にするまでには、想像以上の時間がかかりました。決して平坦な道ではありませんでしたが、ともに考え、ともに歩んでくださった皆さまのおかげで、この始まりをお届けできることを心から嬉しく思います。

TALETONEは、ただ音楽をつくる場所ではありません。
物語が音になり、その音が誰かの世界へ届いていく――そんなチームを目指しています。

支えてくださったメンバーの皆さま、制作に力を貸してくださった皆さま、そしていつも応援してくださるすべての皆さまへ、心より感謝申し上げます。

まだ小さな一歩ではありますが、これからも音楽と物語を一ページずつ丁寧に紡いでまいります。

これからのTALETONEも、どうぞよろしくお願いいたします。

A tale becomes a tone.
A tone becomes music.

TALETONE MUSIC

kr.title: STELLIVE Universe ‘마음악보’ 발매
kr.summary: TALETONE이 음악 제작으로 함께한 STELLIVE Universe의 단체 오리지널 싱글 ‘마음악보’가 발매되었습니다.
kr.body:
TALETONE이 음악 제작으로 함께한 STELLIVE Universe의 단체 오리지널 싱글 ‘마음악보’가 발매되었습니다.

‘마음악보’는 스텔라이브 2기생 유닛 'Universe' 소속 아티스트
'시라유키 히나', '네네코 마시로', '아카네 리제', '아라하시 타비'가 함께한 곡으로, ‘청춘’이라는 테마 아래 시간과 추억이 노래 안에 새겨지는 순간을 그려냅니다.

TALETONE은 이번 곡에서 작곡, 편곡, 연주, 보컬 가이드 및 보컬 에디팅 등 음악 제작 전반에 참여했습니다.
청량한 멜로디와 록 밴드 사운드 위에, 서툴지만 눈부셨던 순간들이 하나의 악보처럼 남을 수 있도록 마음을 담았습니다.

소중한 프로젝트에 함께할 수 있어 진심으로 감사드립니다.
‘마음악보’가 많은 분들의 마음속에도 오래 남는 노래가 되기를 바랍니다.

A tale becomes a tone.
A tone becomes music.

TALETONE MUSIC

en.title: STELLIVE Universe 'Heart Score' Released
en.summary: The original group single 'Heart Score' by STELLIVE Universe, with music production by TALETONE, has officially been released.
en.body:
The original group single 'Heart Score' by STELLIVE Universe, with music production by TALETONE, has officially been released.

'Heart Score' is performed by the four artists of STELLIVE's 2nd Generation unit 'Universe'—Shirayuki Hina, Neneko Mashiro, Akane Lize, and Arahashi Tabi. Under the theme of youth, the song captures the moments when time and memories are written into music.

TALETONE participated throughout the music production, including composition, arrangement, instrumental performance, vocal guide production, and vocal editing.

Built upon bright melodies and a rock band sound, we poured our hearts into creating a song where those clumsy yet radiant moments could remain like notes on a musical score.

We are sincerely grateful to have been part of such a meaningful project.

We hope 'Heart Score' will remain in the hearts of many listeners for a long time.

A tale becomes a tone.
A tone becomes music.

TALETONE MUSIC

jp.title: STELLIVE Universe『心の楽譜』リリース
jp.summary: TALETONEが音楽制作で参加した、STELLIVE Universeのオリジナルグループシングル『心の楽譜』がリリースされました。
jp.body:
STELLIVE Universe『心の楽譜』リリース

TALETONEが音楽制作で参加した、STELLIVE Universeのオリジナルグループシングル『心の楽譜』がリリースされました。

『心の楽譜』は、STELLIVE第2期生ユニット『Universe』に所属する白雪ひな、ねねこマシロ、茜リゼ、アラハシ・タビの4人が歌う楽曲です。「青春」をテーマに、時間と思い出が歌の中へ刻まれていく瞬間を描いています。

TALETONEは本作において、作曲・編曲・演奏・ボーカルガイド制作・ボーカルエディットなど、音楽制作全般を担当しました。

爽やかなメロディーとロックバンドサウンドに乗せて、不器用でありながらも輝いていた日々が、一冊の楽譜のように残ることを願い、心を込めて制作しました。

この素晴らしいプロジェクトに参加できたことを、心より感謝申し上げます。

『心の楽譜』が、多くの方々の心に長く残る一曲となりますように。

A tale becomes a tone.
A tone becomes music.

TALETONE MUSIC

Every story carries

bridges.text:
이렇게 옮긴 음색들이 머무를
두 개의 세계가 되었습니다.

kr.text:
이렇게 옮긴 음색들이 머무를
두 개의 세계가 되었습니다.

en.text:
The tones we gathered
have found a home in two worlds.

jp.text:
紡がれた音色は、
やがて二つの世界の居場所となりました。

bridges.text:
그 세계를 음악으로 짓기 위해,
우리는 모였습니다.

kr.text:
그 세계를 음악으로 짓기 위해,
우리는 모였습니다.

en.text:
To build those worlds through music,
we came together.

jp.text:
その世界を音楽で紡ぐために、
私たちは集まりました。

bridges.text:
손끝에 닿은 이야기는 소리가 되고,
마침내 한 편의 음악으로 피어났습니다.

kr.text:
손끝에 닿은 이야기는 소리가 되고,
마침내 한 편의 음악으로 피어났습니다.

en.text:
The stories that reached our fingertips became sound,
and at last, blossomed into music.

jp.text:
指先に触れた物語は音となり、
やがて一篇の音楽として花開きました。

bridges.eyebrow: THE TALE KEEPS TRAVELING BEYOND THE PAGE.
bridges.text:
책장 밖으로 흘러나온 이야기들은
작은 소식이 되어,
먼 곳의 마음까지 닿아갑니다.

kr.text:
책장 밖으로 흘러나온 이야기는
작은 소식이 되어 날아갑니다.

en.text:
The story that drifted beyond the pages
becomes a little piece of news
and flies away.

jp.text:
ページの外へこぼれ出した物語は、
小さなお知らせとなって
飛んでいきます。

bridges.text:
이제 남은 한 페이지는,
당신의 이야기입니다.

kr.text:
이제 남은 한 페이지는,
당신의 이야기입니다.

en.text: Now, the final page is yours.

jp.text:
そして最後の一ページは、
あなたの物語です。
